PAVLOW, INC., DBA ADD-A-GARAGE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. ADD-A-GARAGE/PAVLOW IS AN INDISPENSABLE PARTY. IT WOULD NOT BE CONVENIENT FOR THE COURT OR THE PARTIES OR PERMIT GREATER EXPEDIENCY TO REQUIRE TWO SEPARATE TRIALS IN THIS MATTER. CCP SECTION 1048(B). IN ADDITION, THE COURT STATED THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL WILL PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion To Sever X-Complaint Of X-Deft Bashland Builders,Inc. And Jeffery Rexford Against Fred W. Pavlow,Inc., Dba Add-A-Garage
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS JACK N. THORNTON AND PATRICIA H. THORNTON'S MOTION TO SEVER CROSS-COMPLAINT OF CROSS-DEFENDANT BASHLAND BUILDERS, INC. AND JEFFERY REXFORD AGAINST FRED W. PAVLOW, INC., DBA ADD-A-GARAGE.

APPEARANCES: Terence O. Mayo, Esq. of Mayo & Mayo 397-1515 for pltfs & moving parties; Eric S. Ritigstein, Esq. of Law Offices of Middlebrook, Kaiser, Hengesbach & Dawson 925/718-1040 for x-defts/x-complainants & opposing parties Bashland, Inc. & Jeffrey Rexford.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. ADD-A-GARAGE/PAVLOW IS AN INDISPENSABLE PARTY. IT WOULD NOT BE CONVENIENT FOR THE COURT OR THE PARTIES OR PERMIT GREATER EXPEDIENCY TO REQUIRE TWO SEPARATE TRIALS IN THIS MATTER. CCP SECTION 1048(b). In addition, the Court stated the motion is denied without prejudice. Plaintiffs counsel will prepare a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
